nasb.text: “I have kept silent for a long time, I have kept still and restrained Myself. Now like a woman in labor I will groan, I will both gasp and pant.

esv.text: For a long time I have held my peace; I have kept still and restrained myself; now I will cry out like a woman in labor; I will gasp and pant.

cnv.text: 我已經很久緘默不言， 閉口不語， 但現在我要像待產的婦人一樣呼喊， 我要急速地喘氣。

ccb.text: “我已沉默多时，我克制不语， 现在我要发出急促的呐喊， 像分娩的妇人。

csbs.text: “我静默不言，沉默克制，已经很久了； 但现在我要大喊， 像临产的妇人那样急促呼吸、喘气。
